name: Twelfth Night Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine butter, orange juice concentrate, grated rind, vanilla and salt in a small saucepan; cook over low heat, stirring, until the butter is melted. Remove from heat and cool to lukewarm.
2. In a large bowl, beat eggs and egg yolks until tripled in volume. Gradually add flour and cornstarch, folding gently into the egg mixture.
3. Gently fold in the orange juice concentrate mixture until there is no trace of butter left.
4. Pour batter into a greased 9-inch tube pan.
5. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F (175°C) for about 40 minutes, or until the cake starts to come away from the sides of the pan. Cool completely.
6. Remove from the pan and sprinkle the top of the cake with powdered sugar. Garnish the sides of the cake with orange slices if desired.
